pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
Replace the removed javax.annotation-api dependency with the Jakarta EE equivalent required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is not available in the default classpath of Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3); code using @Generated or similar annotations will fail to compile or link without the jakarta.annotation-api dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation features.
